name: Coffee Tirami Su
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Whipped cream or non-dairy whipped topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream yolks and sugar until smooth.
2. Add mascarpone cheese and mix on low speed for 2 minutes.
3. Fold in the cream (or whipped topping).
4. Combine coffee and brandy in a bowl.
5. Dip 15 ladyfingers, one by one, into the brandy mixture.
6. Line up the dipped ladyfingers on a platter to make a rectangle about 7 by 13 inches.
7. Cover with half of the mascarpone/cream mixture.
8. Repeat with another layer and top with remaining cream mixture.
9. Sift cocoa powder over the top.
10. With the remaining ladyfingers, cut them in half and arrange around the rectangle with the cut side down.
11. The cream surrounding the edges of the layers acts as a "glue".
12. Refrigerate for about 4 hours.
13. To serve, cut into squares.
